title: Zendesk
text:
This is our main (and first) Zendesk instance. Most people interacting with GitLab Support will use this instance.

Accessible by: Everyone

Production domain: gitlab Portal access: https://support.gitlab.com/hc Agent access: https://gitlab.zendesk.com/agent Internal brand access: https://gitlab-internal.zendesk.com/hc NOTE: Must sign-in to the agent access link first

Portal access: https://support.gitlab.com/hc

Agent access: https://gitlab.zendesk.com/agent

Internal brand access: https://gitlab-internal.zendesk.com/hc NOTE: Must sign-in to the agent access link first

NOTE: Must sign-in to the agent access link first

Sandbox domain: gitlab1707170878 Portal access: https://gitlab1707170878.zendesk.com/hc Agent access: https://gitlab1707170878.zendesk.com/agent Internal brand access: https://gitlab1707170878-internal.zendesk.com/hc NOTE: Must sign-in to the agent access link first

Portal access: https://gitlab1707170878.zendesk.com/hc

Agent access: https://gitlab1707170878.zendesk.com/agent

Internal brand access: https://gitlab1707170878-internal.zendesk.com/hc NOTE: Must sign-in to the agent access link first

NOTE: Must sign-in to the agent access link first

Zendesk US Government

This is a Zendesk instance made specifically with Self-Managed public sector users in mind. It has many restrictions and is not generally usable without pre-approval.

Accessible by: US Citizens only
